title: × Neotinacamptis huteri
taxonomy: × Neotinacamptis huteri is a hybrid orchid species, specifically a cross between Neotinea ustulata and Cynorkis hirta. It was named after Karl Huter, an Austrian botanist. The classification of × Neotinacamptis huteri is within the Orchidaceae family, which includes a vast array of orchid species. This orchid species is endemic to the Mediterranean region. × Neotinacamptis huteri is a rare and endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
